name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Logtung Project in North America dated May 2008.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Logtung Project in North America dated May 2008.pdf
document.description: This NI 43-101 Technical Report details the updated Mineral Resource Estimate for the Northern Dancer (Logtung) tungsten-molybdenum project, highlighting geological surveys, drillings, and estimations conducted primarily by Largo Resources Ltd. with the assistance of Snowden Mining Industry Consultants.

mineral_inventory.zone: tungsten-rich portion of the northern dancer deposit
